summary: Comprehensive testing of Drops Curated - Categories and Sizes Preferences feature. All 10 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI flows working correctly including the new categories (garments/sneakers/accessories) and sizes (XS-XXL, UK6-UK12, Free Size) selection in preferences step.
test_credentials: Test phones: 9876543221-9876543225 (new test subscribers for categories/sizes tests). Sandbox OTP auto-returned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Categories and sizes feature fully implemented and tested. Backend POST /api/preferences accepts categories and sizes arrays. GET /api/preferences/{phone} returns saved categories and sizes. Frontend preferences step shows 3 categories (garments, sneakers, accessories) and 14 sizes (XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL, UK6-UK12, Free Size). Success step shows selected categories and sizes in summary. All data-testid attributes present for testing.

categories_api.all_3_categories: PASS - Can save garments, sneakers, accessories
categories_api.empty_categories_means_all: PASS - Empty array means all categories

sizes_api.all_14_sizes: PASS - Can save XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL, UK6-UK12, Free Size
sizes_api.empty_sizes_means_all: PASS - Empty array means all sizes

combined_preferences.categories_sizes_brands_combined: PASS - All fields save together correctly

full_subscription_flow.step_1_verify: PASS - Phone input, send OTP, verify OTP
full_subscription_flow.step_2_details: PASS - Name input, proceed to payment
full_subscription_flow.step_4_preferences: PASS - Categories, sizes, brands, alert types selection
full_subscription_flow.step_5_success: PASS - Shows categories and sizes in summary

mocked_apis.twilio_whatsapp: SANDBOX mode - logs messages, doesn't actually send
